title: Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Scrapbook
content:
{{Top|rwm|ref|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Attack_of_the_Clones_Scrapbook.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Scrapbook'' |author=[[Ryder Windham]] |cover artist= |illustrator=[[Jason Zamajtuk]] {{C|Interior Design}} |editor= |publisher=[[Random House]], Inc. |release date=[[April 23]], [[2002]]{{SWArchive|url=eu/news/2002/04/news20020426.html|text=Episode II Books from Random House}} |type=Paperback |pages=48 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0375815821 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: Attack of the Clones Scrapbook''''' is a [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] children's reference book that serves as the "Ultimate Insider's Guide" to the [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. It was written by [[Ryder Windham]] and published by [[Random House]] on [[April 23]], [[2002]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Publisher's summary== ''Packed with over 100 thrilling photos, this scrapbook is your insider's guide to the mesmerizing wonders of ''Star Wars'': Episode II―''Attack of the Clones''.''
''Discover fascinating details about the fantastic characters, planets, weapons, aliens, ships, vehicles, and droids featured in this breathtaking, heroic adventure―the latest installment of the greatest space saga of all time!'' ==Contents== #Introduction #The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] #The [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] #The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] #The [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Senate]] #[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Coruscant Underworld/Legends|Underworld]] #[[Bounty hunter/Legends|Bounty Hunters]] #[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] #Return to [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] #Return to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] #[[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] ==Media== ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|0375815821}}; [[April 23]], [[2002]]; [[Random House]], Inc.; US
